Interface IConstructClothoid2

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geometry
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geometry.dll

Methods for constructing clothoid spirals, that use true tangent instead of finite difference.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("464A4DE0-A96F-4DE7-B2DC-E35C0EF74F72")]
public interface IConstructClothoid2
